input.question: What is the average maximum section size per department?

payload.question: What is the average maximum section size per department?

output.sql:
WITH dept_sections AS (
  SELECT d.id AS department_id,
         d.name AS department_name,
         s.max_size AS section_max_size
  FROM sections s
  JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.id
  WHERE s.max_size IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  department_name AS department_name,
  AVG(section_max_size) AS avg_max_section_size,
  COUNT(*) AS section_count
FROM dept_sections
GROUP BY department_name
ORDER BY avg_max_section_size DESC;

payload.sql:
WITH dept_sections AS (
  SELECT d.id AS department_id,
         d.name AS department_name,
         s.max_size AS section_max_size
  FROM sections s
  JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.id
  WHERE s.max_size IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  department_name AS department_name,
  AVG(section_max_size) AS avg_max_section_size,
  COUNT(*) AS section_count
FROM dept_sections
GROUP BY department_name
ORDER BY avg_max_section_size DESC;
